series_metadata.series_description: These records contain all documents pertaining to funds maintained and administered by banks for the collective investments of personal trust accounts within the trust departments of state-chartered banks

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility one (1) year date of receipt ; Electronic: electronic files one (1) year date of receipt
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
